overall.description: A cinematic panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour, captured from a high vantage point in Cyberpunk 2077. The footage features dense neon-lit megabuildings, holographic advertisements, and flying vehicles traversing the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk cityscape overlook with towering megabuildings

events.description: flying vehicle enters from left side of frame and moves horizontally across the skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a high balcony or rooftop, slowly panning the camera left to take in the urban vista

notable_agents.action: flying car moving from left to right across the distant skyline

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated number 11 near the top, dominating the right side of the frame
building facade with multiple stacked digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
circular rotating structure with illuminated holographic advertisements at the base of a building
elevated multi-level highway structure running horizontally through the cityscape
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with various antennae and spires visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The opening view establishes a sweeping cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour. The camera is positioned on a high vantage point overlooking dense futuristic architecture, with the prominent megabuilding 11 standing on the right and a stacked billboard structure on the left. A flying vehicle cruises across the skyline as the warm sunset backlight illuminates the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: central city district with neon-lit towers

events.description: camera continues slow leftward pan, revealing more of the central downtown district
second flying vehicle passes through the upper center portion of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward pan across the urban landscape, maintaining steady observation of the city architecture

entered.detail: distant skyscraper illuminated with prominent red neon lighting visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the perspective shifts to reveal the central city district. The stacked billboard structure moves toward the center of the frame while megabuilding 11 retreats to the far right. A red neon-lit tower becomes visible in the distant center, and another flying vehicle cruises through the skyline. The warm golden hour lighting continues to bathe the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: left district with green neon signage

events.description: flying vehicle descends from upper left and moves across the frame
another flying vehicle passes through the upper left quadrant of the skyline

agents.ego_description: completing the leftward pan, focusing on the left side of the cityscape with new architectural elements coming into view

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle descending from above and traversing the left side of the skyline

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with green neon signage and lighting elements

segments.scene_description: The final segment completes the panoramic sweep, revealing the left district of the city. The green neon facade emerges on the left while the stacked billboard structure and red neon tower shift to the right side of the frame. Megabuilding 11 and the rotary holographic advert exit the view. Multiple flying vehicles traverse the skyline as the camera maintains its steady observation of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, transitioning from a high vantage point over the eastern district to a wide view of the western skyline during golden hour. It begins with a view of dense architecture featuring megabuilding 11 on the right and a stacked billboard structure on the left, while a flying vehicle cruises through the warm, hazy sunset backlight. As the camera pans left, the perspective shifts toward the central district, moving the billboard structure toward the center and revealing a distant red neon-lit tower as another vehicle traverses the sky. The scene then expands further to the left, bringing a green neon facade into view while the red tower and billboards shift to the right. Finally, megabuilding 11 and a rotary holographic advertisement exit the frame as multiple flying vehicles glide across the horizon of the sprawling metropolis.
